summary: The tooth begins its process of emerging from the gums around Stage 8 of Nolla’s dental development phases; prior stages focus more on preparation and growth within the jawbone leading up to this critical point where teeth start becoming visibly present outside the mouth tissue. \boxed{The tooth initiates eruption near Stage 8 per Nolla's criteria after significant internal preparations occur first}. formatted_summary: agent1 (Round 2 summarized): The tooth begins its process of emerging from the gums around Stage 8 of Nolla’s dental development phases; prior stages focus more on preparation and growth within the jawbone leading up to this critical point where teeth start becoming visibly present outside the mouth tissue. \boxed{The tooth initiates eruption near Stage 8 per Nolla's criteria after significant internal preparations occur first}.
